title: DoorDash Releases First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
text: DoorDash released its first quarter 2026 financial results press release through its investor relations website. The company reported strong operational performance with continued product improvements and healthy consumer demand trends driving record membership signups, new highs for monthly active users, and strong consumer engagement across marketplaces. Total Orders increased 27% year-over-year to 933 million, with the company adding 201 million orders during the quarter. Marketplace GOV grew 37% to $31.6 billion, demonstrating robust growth across all segments. The company expects marketplace gross order value in Q2 2026 to range between $32.4 billion and $33.4 billion, significantly exceeding analyst expectations of $31.8 billion. Adjusted EBITDA guidance for Q2 is in the range of $770-870 million. DashPass and other membership programs achieved record engagement and accelerated member growth, signaling heightened stickiness and retention. More than 35 million members exited 2025 across DashPass, Wolt Plus, and Deliveroo Plus. The company outlined its commitment to investing several hundred million dollars more in new initiatives and platform development in 2026 compared to 2025 levels.
